campbell.title: Campbell City Council — May 5, 2026
campbell.summary: The Campbell City Council met to hear updates on local transportation funding and investments, review a new policy about how the city's property can be used, and discuss efforts to fill open city job positions and keep employees.
keyTopics: Santa Clara Valley Transportation Authority's March 2026 investment report
New policy restricting use of city property for federal civil enforcement
City job openings and strategies to recruit and retain employees

saratoga.title: Saratoga City Council — April 15, 2026
saratoga.summary: The City Council held a public hearing to address concerns about cleaning up hazardous conditions on certain properties identified by the County, and voted to move forward with the cleanup work. The council also adopted a new technology policy for the city and approved a process for residents to request accommodations under disability and accessibility laws.
keyTopics: Public hearing on hazardous property cleanup ordered by the County
New city technology disruption policy adopted
Process established for residents to request reasonable accommodations

los-gatos.title: Los Gatos Town Council — May 19, 2026
los-gatos.summary: The Los Gatos Town Council met on May 19, 2026, to approve financial reports, authorize several service agreements and construction contracts, and plan projects for the upcoming fiscal year. Key decisions included accepting a donation of emergency medical equipment, approving road paving work, and submitting grant applications for statewide funding.
keyTopics: Approved financial report for March 2026
Authorized O'Grady Paving construction contract
Accepted donation of Automated External Defibrillator (AED)
Submitted state grant applications
Adopted project list for Fiscal Year 2026-27

san-jose.title: San José City Council — May 20, 2026
san-jose.summary: The San José City Council held a meeting to plan upcoming agendas and review committee work plans. The May 26 meeting was cancelled, so the council focused on organizing the June 2 agenda and updating plans for neighborhood services and government operations.
keyTopics: Cancelled May 26 City Council meeting
June 2, 2026 draft agenda organization
Neighborhood Services and Education Committee work plan update
Rules and Open Government Committee work plan review
Council-sponsored events approval

mountain-view.title: Mountain View City Council — May 20, 2026
mountain-view.summary: The Mountain View City Council met to approve meeting minutes, hear public comments, and select new members for the Youth Advisory Committee for the 2026-27 fiscal year. Council members also reviewed upcoming agendas for various boards and commissions.
keyTopics: Youth Advisory Committee member selection and appointments
Public comment period on city matters
Approval of previous meeting minutes
Upcoming board and commission agendas

sunnyvale.title: Sunnyvale City Council — May 19, 2026
sunnyvale.summary: The Sunnyvale City Council held a regular meeting on May 19, 2026, where they recognized Asian Pacific American Heritage Month and Affordable Housing Month. The council reviewed April meeting minutes and conducted standard business during the evening session.
keyTopics: Asian Pacific American Heritage Month recognition
Affordable Housing Month observance
April 2026 meeting minutes approval

cupertino.title: Cupertino City Council — May 19, 2026
cupertino.summary: The Cupertino City Council met to update the city's long-term Health and Safety Plan (covering 2015-2040), recognized the Public Works Department for their work on roads, utilities, and city maintenance during Public Works Week, and celebrated Asian American Pacific Islander Month.
keyTopics: Updates to Health and Safety Element of the General Plan
Public Works Department recognition for infrastructure and maintenance services
Asian American Pacific Islander (AAPI) Month celebration
Some agenda items were postponed

santa-clara.title: Santa Clara City Council — May 21, 2026
santa-clara.summary: The Santa Clara Station Area Task Force held a special meeting on May 21, 2026, at City Hall to discuss topics related to the station area development. The full agenda details were not included in the available notice.
keyTopics: Station Area Task Force special meeting convened
Meeting held at City Hall in the East Wing (1500 Warburton Avenue)
Virtual attendance available via Zoom

milpitas.title: Milpitas City Council — May 19, 2026
milpitas.summary: The Milpitas City Council held several public hearings on May 19, 2026, to vote on new local rules, approve a development permit change, confirm property assessments, and permanently hire a new city manager. Residents had the opportunity to speak on these matters before the council made decisions.
keyTopics: New local ordinance rules (urgency measure requiring immediate adoption)
Land development permit amendment and map approval
Property assessment confirmation and related orders
Permanent City Manager appointment

palo-alto.title: Palo Alto City Council — May 15, 2026
palo-alto.summary: The city council discussed plans to help Palo Alto residents switch from gas to electric heating and appliances in their homes. The council reviewed proposed principles and programs for this residential electrification effort, which is part of meeting air quality regulations set by the regional Air District.
keyTopics: Residential electrification status and progress
Proposed principles for helping residents switch to electric appliances
Air District regulation compliance requirements
Staff presentation and environmental review status
